content: Install resend lib + add RESEND_API_KEY/SENDER_EMAIL to backend/.env
Create app/services/email_service.py with helpers + 6 HTML templates
Auto-list on Share toggle: backend hook in closet update endpoint
Listing detail enriched with seller country/city (fallback to home_location)
Wire sale-completion emails to PayPal capture/webhook handler
Frontend: 'Complete listing' CTA on closet card for auto-created listings
Lint + smoke test wave 1; add /analyze/version markers
